The same authority (i.e. sage Para^ara) has given the dura-
tion of visibility and combustion of Mercury in the seven courses in
terms of days as 40, 30, 22, 18, 9, 15, and 11 days respectively.
[The idea is that if Mercury gets eclipsed or rises in his first
course, he will remain invisible or visible for 40 days.
